theme_archetype.description: Blends the clinical trust and warmth of healthcare (green/blue tones) with the architectural precision of hospital planning (sharp grids, structural typography).

headings.usage: Authoritative, modern, slightly architectural. Used for all H1-H4.

body.usage: Clean, highly readable sans-serif for long-form text and UI labels.

ui_ux_patterns.layout: Bento grids for services and projects. Generous padding (py-24 for sections). Sharp or 4px rounded corners (no pill-shaped cards) to maintain architectural feel.
ui_ux_patterns.glowing_light: Subtle, large blurred radial gradients behind hero and key call-to-actions, adapting to light/dark mode (e.g., medical blue glow in dark mode).
ui_ux_patterns.animation: Framer Motion for entrance staggering. 'Reel-style' horizontal scroll for the Projects/Portfolio section using framer-motion useScroll.
ui_ux_patterns.3d_hero: Implement subtle 3D floating particles or an architectural wireframe globe in the hero section based on the provided three.js HTML reference.

pages_blueprint.name: Home
sections: Hero with 3D animation, glowing text, CTA

pages_blueprint.name: Projects
sections: Case Studies (HD imagery of blueprints and finished hospitals)

tech_stack_guidelines.frontend: React.js, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI, Framer Motion, Three.js (for hero), React Router DOM
tech_stack_guidelines.backend: Node.js/Express or Next.js API Routes (depending on setup), MongoDB for contact form, Resend API for emails
tech_stack_guidelines.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-btn')

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure dark mode works seamlessly; toggle should swap CSS variables for background, surface, text, primary, and secondary colors.
Do NOT use generic medical templates. Apply strict grid layouts (Bento) and sharp borders to evoke architectural precision.
Include the glowing light effect behind the Hero text using Tailwind blur (e.g., bg-primary/20 blur-3xl).
Implement horizontal scroll (reel-style) for the Projects section.
Integrate a rule-based floating FAQ chatbot widget.
Build a secure Admin page to view MongoDB contact submissions.
